checkoutAfterCheckin: I-check-out kumele ibe emva kosuku lwe-check-in.
networkError: Iphutha lenetwork. Hlola uxhumano lwakho uzame futhi.
tryAgain: Kukhona okungahambanga kahle. Sicela uzame futhi.
acceptTerms: Sicela wamukele imithetho yokubhuka ukuze uqhubeke.
waitBeforeSubmit: Sicela ulinde isikhashana ngaphambi kokuthumela futhi.
unableCreateBooking: Asikwazi ukwenza i-booking. Sicela uzame futhi.
selectBothDates: Sicela ukhethe zinsuku zombili ze-check-in ne-check-out.
selectDatesBelow: Khetha izinsuku zakho ngezansi, bese usesha amakamelo atholakalayo.
